title: Evangelion with different characters AU settings
display_title: Evangelion with different characters AU settings
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion with different characters / AU settings             Quote Post by PuppetChaos » Mon Apr 13, 2009 6:55 pm Let's just make this about what kind of alternate universe settings you'd like to see (that haven't been milked to hell and back, IE: Eva Highschool)... if it includes different casts or not, that's cool. Forgive me in advance if this is the wrong forum. A friend and I recently discussed the possibility of Evangelion series(es)/games/manga/comics/deliciouscake that don't use the original cast, but rather a whole new one. (I do understand that Eva's main draw is its characters, but play along with me for a second) Something like how Gundam now has various AUs that only really share some concepts (and the boring, boring V-Fin)... so if you were to do an Evangelion AU where you couldn't use the original cast, and more or less could do whatever you wanted, what would you want to see? None of it would affect the canon of the main series. Personally, I always liked Yamashita's "After the Angels all are killed, Man uses Evas in 'conventional' warfare" (that being said, I don't think Yamashita's idea of wolfmen and/or ReiClones taking over the world is really all that hot, though) ...basically an Eva AU where the Angels have long since been eliminated, and now there's armies of Evas and Eva-derivations battling against each other. Lots of explosions, blood, etc. Possibly post-apocalyptic. (like, barren wastelands apocalyptic)

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Apr 13, 2009 6:59 pm I don't really know how to even consider such a thing, since the cast is the whole point of Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Apr 13, 2009 7:21 pm I would replace Shinji with Chee.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Mon Apr 13, 2009 8:04 pm Ah ha ha ha ha ha ha..... aaaah HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HAAAA!

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Mon Apr 13, 2009 8:04 pm I'd turn the TV off and play some videogames instead.

[]:             Quote Post by PuppetChaos » Mon Apr 13, 2009 8:22 pm Eh, I figured this topic was a long shot. I'll just open this up to crazy alternate universe ideas in general.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Mon Apr 13, 2009 8:23 pm I wouldn't be interested if it is Evas battling each other in some futuristic war. Where's the novelty? I'd be more interested in buried/decommissioned evas being discovered by a future society. The story could provide several "oh shit" scenarios like: 1) the eva sucking the soul out of an unsuspecting human guinea pig 2) an exposition of all the unethical technology that's required to make the eva work 3) eva being activated with no safeties in place

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Mon Apr 13, 2009 8:55 pm Bright Noah instead of Misato

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Apr 13, 2009 8:58 pm Eva/Hamtaro fusion

[]:             Quote Post by rberlin » Mon Apr 13, 2009 10:05 pm Nerv lieutenants spinoff.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Apr 13, 2009 10:31 pm rberlin wrote: Nerv lieutenants spinoff.

[]:             Quote Post by GAP » Mon Apr 13, 2009 10:51 pm Well, how about something that takes place in medieval times or some Dragon Quest ripoff featuring art by Toriyama.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Apr 14, 2009 1:04 am This thread is a lot like this one : http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6336

[]:             Quote Post by GVman » Tue Apr 14, 2009 7:40 pm I wonder what EVA would be like if Domon Kasshu was the pilot of EVA-01?

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Sat Apr 18, 2009 12:55 am Alright...hear me out on this... It's high school, in America. We'll need a diverse cast, so they'll come from different parts of the country, and they'll all meet in New York, since everyone knows what New York is like. Also, everyone will have a Midwestern accent. Sam is the hero, and starting quarterback on the high school football team. He hopes to find the girl of his dreams and get a football scholarship someday, so he can eventually become a pro player. Sam's father, Gerald, doesn't get along with his son, since he's the football coach! There's also something about his wife and Sam's mother (to only be referenced as "Mom" only), leaving him...or something, but we won't focus on that. Rachel is Sam's step-sister, and a bookworm. She helps him with his homework and they have a good brother/sister relationship. She also helps him with girl troubles. Angie is the feisty Texas girl who's new in town (she too will speak with a Midwestern accent). Sam doesn't think much of his football skills, being from Texas, but she is soon amazed by his performance, and she becomes determined to get with him. Sam and Angie live with their crazy, Starbucks-addicted guardian, Michelle. She's also the offensive coordinator for the football team, and she encourages Sam to go with his gut when playing, rather than listen to Gerald. Tommy is Sam's best friend, and he is also the best receiver on the team. However, while taking on one of the toughest teams, he breaks his leg, and is out for the rest of the season! There aren't angels anymore...just other school's football teams. For the finale, Sam gets into a fight with Angie and they break up. He barely manages to take the team to State's because he is so distraught...but then he meets Karen, who threatens to steal him from Angie, for good! But wait a minute...PLOT TWIST! Karen is the quarterback for the team he'll be facing in State's! A girl playing football? I kid you not. Well, in the end, Sam beats Karen's team, and makes it back to dance with Angie at the Winter Ball, and everyone lives happily ever after! Oh God, I feel sick for even writing this as a joke.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Apr 18, 2009 2:54 am GVman wrote: I wonder what EVA would be like if Domon Kasshu was the pilot of EVA-01?

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sat Apr 18, 2009 11:40 am Hey, imagine if Robo(Sexy voice and Robo) was behind an EVA. Yeah, I'd run too even though it's animated.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat Apr 18, 2009 10:48 pm A eva series done like The Rocky Horror Picture would funny to see lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 19, 2009 2:49 am Just take some of Gainax' own crossover art at face value -- Nadia as the lead, Jung Freud as the loud outsider...
